_comment: Supply system: four resources consumed on the overworld, each tied to a passive skill

food.name: Food
food.description: Consumed each overworld step per party member. Without food, passive healing stops; prolonged starvation drains HP.

herbs.name: Herbs
herbs.description: Consumed by the Medicine passive to boost party healing on the overworld. When depleted, bonus healing stops but base healing continues.

scrap.name: Scrap
scrap.description: Consumed by the Smithing passive to repair equipment durability and restore ranged ammo. When depleted, repair and ammo restore stop.

reagents.name: Reagents
reagents.description: Consumed by Alchemy to passively brew potions, bombs, and oils on the overworld. Can be toggled off to save for active crafting.

overworld_healing._comment: Base passive healing happens as long as party has food. Medicine bonus stacks on top but costs herbs.

starvation._comment: When food hits 0: healing stops immediately. Grace period before HP drain based on LOWEST party Constitution.

logistics_overworld._comment: Each Logistics level reduces food consumption and increases overworld movement speed.

smithing_overworld._comment: Smithing passively repairs durability and restores ammo each overworld step (costs scrap).

alchemy_overworld._comment: Alchemy passively brews items from unlocked tiers while travelling (costs reagents). Can be toggled off. Higher Alchemy = better odds of brewing higher-tier items.

alchemy_crafting_tiers._comment: Items unlocked by Alchemy perks. Each tier grants access to a group of items for both passive and active crafting. Reagent cost listed per item.

ammo_limits._comment: Max ammo by weapon type. Restored passively via Smithing+Scrap, or to full at shops for gold.
